'''Trieron''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world and the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]]. It was a research planet covered in cool oceans and glacial continents. Several learning institutions had oceanographic research bases there, including [[Academy at Sab Rufo]], [[Metharg's University]], and [[UnitedChem/SoroSuub University]].
